note:
Lane 0f verification had significant cross-lane contention issues. Multiple lane-owner sessions modified the same files (tool.ts, registry.ts, cache.ts, session/tools.ts) concurrently without coordination. Key issues:
1. smart_find tool sometimes returns empty results for files that exist on disk (tool.ts showed no results initially but was present)
2. smart_bun's cwd parameter for typecheck doesn't work correctly - it says "Script not found" even when the script exists in package.json
3. bash rerouting intercepts many legitimate piped commands (grep, head, tee)
4. session/tools.ts staged deletion went undetected until lane 0f checked - no conflict detection
5. The coordination bus doesn't alert when one lane deletes a file another lane is actively modifying
